name: 烟台
description: Yantai is a beautiful coastal city in Shandong Province, known for its wine production, fresh seafood, and stunning seaside scenery. Features the famous Penglai Pavilion, scenic coastal road, and as the birthplace of China's modern macaroni industry. A charming blend of colonial architecture and traditional Chinese culture.
highlights: Penglai Pavilion - legendary birthplace of immortals
Coastal Tourism Zone - beautiful seaside scenery

climate.tips: Best in summer for beaches and autumn for wine harvest. Pleasant sea breezes. Winter cold but scenic. Avoid Golden Week October.

attractions.name: 蓬莱阁
attractions.description: Legendary Taoist shrine said to be the dwelling place of the Eight Immortals. UNESCO World Heritage site with ancient architecture and sea views.
attractions.tips: Arrive early to avoid crowds. Combine with nearby sam beach. The legend of Eight Immortals crossing the sea.

attractions.name: 烟台山
attractions.description: Historic hilltop park with colonial architecture, lighthouse, and panoramic views of Yantai Bay.
attractions.tips: Best at sunset for photos. The lighthouse is iconic. Explore colonial history.

attractions.name: 金沙滩
attractions.description: 10km pristine beach with golden sand, clear water, and modern coastal developments.
attractions.tips: Best in summer for swimming. Arrive early for parking. Water sports available.

attractions.name: 张裕酒文化博物馆
attractions.description: World's largest wine museum showcasing China's premier wine producer with underground wine cellars.
attractions.tips: Must-book for wine lovers. Tasting includes premium wines. Underground cellars are impressive.

attractions.name: 月亮湾
attractions.description: Romantic bay with crescent shape, famous love lock displays, and romantic sunset views.
attractions.tips: Best at sunset. Couples place love locks. Great for photos. The Moon老人 rock is iconic.

attractions.name: 蓬莱水城
attractions.description: Historic naval fortress and port from Ming Dynasty, used to defend against wokou pirates.
attractions.tips: Combine with Penglai Pavilion. The water gates are impressive engineering.

attractions.name: 养马岛
attractions.description: Beautiful island known for horse-racing history, now a scenic tourist destination with beaches.
attractions.tips: Drive or bike around island. The coastal road is scenic. Beach time in summer.

attractions.name: 朝阳街
attractions.description: Historic street with well-preserved colonial architecture, shops, and cafes.
attractions.tips: Best evening with lighting. Great for photos. Colonial atmosphere.

attractions.name: 牟氏庄园
attractions.description: Largest surviving private manor in China, showcasing wealthy landlord culture from Qing Dynasty.
attractions.tips: Day trip from Yantai. One of China's largest manor. Well preserved.

attractions.name: 金石湾
attractions.description: Pristine bay with unique rock formations, clear water, and peaceful atmosphere.
attractions.tips: Less crowded than Golden Sand Beach. Great for photography. Snorkeling possible.

attractions.name: 烟台博物馆
attractions.description: Regional museum with collections showcasing Yantai's maritime history and local culture.
attractions.tips: Good for rainy days. Combine with Yantai Mountain visit.

attractions.name: 北极星钟表博物馆
attractions.description: Unique museum dedicated to clock-making history, showcasing China's watch industry heritage.
attractions.tips: Interesting for clock enthusiasts. Near shopping area.

attractions.name: 农博园
attractions.description: Large botanical garden with diverse plant collections and agricultural exhibits.
attractions.tips: Great for families. Spring and summer best for flowers.

attractions.name: 戚继光纪念馆
attractions.description: Memorial to famous Ming Dynasty general who defended China against wokou pirates.
attractions.tips: Combine with Penglai Pavilion. Important historical figure.

attractions.name: 望夫礁
attractions.description: Rock formation said to be a woman waiting for her husband's return, with romantic legend.
attractions.tips: Best at sunrise or sunset. The story is touching.

attractions.name: 栈桥
attractions.description: Historic pier stretching into the sea, iconic symbol of Yantai with colonial origins.
attractions.tips: Best at sunset. Iconic Yantai photo spot.

attractions.name: 昆嵛山
attractions.description: Sacred Taoist mountain with pristine forests, ancient temples, and hiking trails.
attractions.tips: Day trip. Taoist sacred mountain. Best in autumn for foliage.

attractions.name: 科技大道
attractions.description: Modern shopping and entertainment district with international brands and restaurants.
attractions.tips: Best evening and night. International brands.

attractions.name: 地质公园
attractions.description: Coastal geological park with unique rock formations, sea caves, and fossil sites.
attractions.tips: Great for geology enthusiasts. Guided tours available.

attractions.name: 海洋世界
attractions.description: Large aquarium with marine life exhibits, dolphin shows, and penguin habitat.
attractions.tips: Great for families. Book shows in advance.

attractions.name: 渔人码头
attractions.description: Revitalized fishing harbor with shops, restaurants, and maritime attractions.
attractions.tips: Best for seafood. Buy fresh fish. Evening atmosphere.

attractions.name: 马家沟
attractions.description: Eco-tourism village with hot springs, vineyards, and rural charm.
attractions.tips: Day trip. Combine wine and hot springs.

attractions.name: 天崮山
attractions.description: Scenic mountain with unique peaks, ancient temples, and hiking trails.
attractions.tips: Great hiking. Less crowded than major attractions.

attractions.name: 长岛
attractions.description: Beautiful archipelago with pristine beaches, fishing villages, and island hopping.
attractions.tips: Overnight stay recommended. Ferry from Penglai. Authentic island life.

attractions.name: 葡萄酒庄
attractions.description: Several French-style wineries offering tours, tastings, and beautiful vineyard scenery.
attractions.tips: Must-visit for wine lovers. Autumn harvest best. Appointment needed.

attractions.name: 烟台山
attractions.description: 烟台的标志，有灯塔和领事馆旧址。

attractions.name: 朝阳街

attractions.name: 烟台美术馆
attractions.description: 展示中外美术作品。

attractions.name: 金沙滩
attractions.description: 烟台最美的海滩之一。

attractions.name: 烟台苹果
attractions.description: 烟台是中国著名的苹果产地。

attractions.name: 塔山
attractions.description: 烟台市区的小山。

attractions.name: 滨海广场

attractions.name: 烟台海鲜
attractions.description: 烟台有最新鲜的海鲜。

attractions.name: 养马岛
attractions.description: 烟台附近的大岛，有美丽的海滩。

attractions.name: 张裕葡萄酒文化博物馆

attractions.name: 烟台海滨夜景

attractions.description: 烟台是中国著名的大樱桃产地。

arrival.tips: Airport 60km from city center. Airport bus (30¥) or taxi (200¥).

arrival.to: Yantai Railway Station / Yantai South Station
arrival.tips: Yantai Station near city center. High-speed from Qingdao. K-train from Beijing.

hotels.name: 烟台金海岸希尔顿酒店
hotels.bookingTips: Best for beach vacation. Book ocean view rooms.

hotels.name: 烟台香格里拉大酒店
hotels.bookingTips: Best location for sightseeing. Famous Sunday brunch.

hotels.name: 烟台万达文华酒店
hotels.bookingTips: Newer property. Great for business and leisure.

hotels.name: 烟台百瑞佳选酒店
hotels.bookingTips: Best value in center. Reliable Chinese brand.

hotels.name: 烟台华美达广场
hotels.bookingTips: Perfect for sightseeing. Walk to attractions.

hotels.name: 如家酒店烟台栈桥店
hotels.bookingTips: Best budget near waterfront. Simple but reliable.

hotels.name: 7天连锁酒店烟台汽车站店
hotels.bookingTips: Good for bus travelers. Reliable budget chain.

hotels.name: 烟台国际青年旅舍
hotels.bookingTips: Great for backpackers. Beach access. English speaking.

hotels.name: 蓬莱欧乐堡骑士酒店
hotels.bookingTips: Best for Penglai sightseeing. Great for families.

hotels.name: 长岛渔家乐民宿
hotels.bookingTips: Experience island life. Book during fishing season.

hotels.name: 烟台张裕葡萄酒主题酒店
hotels.bookingTips: Perfect for wine lovers. Book wine tour packages.

hotels.name: 烟台养马岛度假酒店
hotels.bookingTips: Perfect for beach vacation. Book during off-peak.

hotels.name: 烟台金沙滩海景酒店
hotels.nameEn: Yantai Golden Sand Beach Sea View Hotel
hotels.bookingTips: Great for beach lovers. Book ocean view rooms.

hotels.name: 烟台朝阳街民宿
hotels.bookingTips: Experience colonial history. Book during off-peak.

hotels.name: 烟台葡萄酒庄酒店
hotels.bookingTips: Perfect for romantic trips. Book wine tasting packages.

culturalTips.title: Seafood Culture
culturalTips.content: Yantai is famous for fresh seafood including sea urchin, abalone, clams, and various fish. The city has strong seafood culture with many restaurants offering fresh catches daily.

culturalTips.title: Maritime Heritage
culturalTips.content: Yantai has 600 years of maritime history as a treaty port. The colonial architecture, especially around Yantai Mountain, reflects its international past with Russian, British, French, and German influence.

culturalTips.title: Wine Culture
culturalTips.content: Yantai is China's wine capital, producing 40% of China's wine. The Changyu winery is world-famous. Wine tourism is popular with vineyard tours and tastings available.

culturalTips.title: Penglai Legend
culturalTips.content: Penglai is legendary as the dwelling place of the Eight Immortals and immortals in Chinese mythology. The Penglai Pavilion is said to be where immortal beings dwell, making it a sacred Taoist site.

culturalTips.title: Yantai Dialect
culturalTips.content: Yantai dialect is part of Ji-Lu Mandarin with distinct pronunciation. The local accent is known for being direct and straightforward. Some words are unique to the region.

culturalTips.title: Best Time to Visit
culturalTips.content: Yantai is best visited May-June for pleasant weather and flowers, or September-October for wine harvest. Summer is popular for beaches but crowded. Golden Week in October should be avoided.

culturalTips.title: Beach Culture
culturalTips.content: Yantai has beautiful beaches with Golden Sand Beach being the most famous. The beaches are popular in summer for swimming and water sports. Some beaches can get crowded in July-August.

culturalTips.title: Colonial Architecture
culturalTips.content: Yantai's colonial history left a legacy of European-style buildings around Yantai Mountain and Chaoyang Street. Many buildings from the late 19th century have been preserved and now house cafes and shops.

culturalTips.title: Local Crafts
culturalTips.content: Yantai is known for kelp/seaweed products, wine (of course), and local snuff bottles. The region's crafts reflect its coastal culture and colonial influences.

culturalTips.title: Must-Try Dishes
culturalTips.content: Yantai specialties include: sea urchin (海胆), razor clams (蛏子), steamed sea bass, sea intestine rice (海肠捞饭), Penglai noodles (蓬莱小面), and local dumplings.

culturalTips.title: Island Hopping
culturalTips.content: The Changdao Islands offer beautiful island scenery with pristine beaches and fishing villages. The archipelago is perfect for escaping the mainland and experiencing authentic island life.

culturalTips.title: Wine Festival
culturalTips.content: The Yantai International Wine Festival held in September showcases local wine culture with tastings, tours, and cultural events. This coincides with the grape harvest season.

culturalTips.title: Getting Around
culturalTips.content: Yantai is spread out with attractions in different districts. Renting a car is recommended for visiting Penglai and Changdao. Didi works well for city transport. Buses are available but can be crowded.

culturalTips.title: Coastal Weather
culturalTips.content: Yantai has pleasant sea breezes in summer making it cooler than inland Shandong. However, winter can be cold and windy from the sea. The fog is common in spring.

culturalTips.title: Evening Entertainment
culturalTips.content: Yantai has growing nightlife centered around Fisherman's Wharf, Chaoyang Street, and the coastal zones. Moon Bay is romantic in the evening. The MixC mall has late-night entertainment.
